title: Single-strand library preparation protocol
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"2o2d2","text":"This library preparation protocol can be easily adapted for different indexing strategies. Combinations of indexed primes can be used for generating single-  or double-indexed libraries. In the first case, PCR_F_universal primer is used in combination with PCR_R_**** primers. For double indexed libraries, the combinations of PCR_F_**** and PCR_R_**** can be used for up to 384 combinations with the primers listed below.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bf5se","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4urhp","text":"Additionally, libraries can be prepared by adding inline index (barcode) to the adapters and amplified either with unindexed illumina primers, or single- or double-indexing strategy. This sequence is then present at the begining of the reads and can be used for sample demultiplexing. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"brf10","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9s6md","text":"Finally, by combining inline barcode with indexed forward and reverse primers, triple-indexed libraries can be constructed. This design is especially useful for the libraries used for the sequence-capture protocols. In such experiments, the reads are captured on DNA or RNA baits and reamplified afterwards. If performed on pooled samples, the post-capture PCR can cause chimeric reads formation among hopmologous sequences from different specimans. Triple-indexing strategy allows for controlling these by comparing the index combination used with the inline barcode.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"62qq9","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2hegk","text":"Adapter sequences:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"thgq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b2fi4","text":"Unindexed adapters:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fipqc","text":"Tin_P1_lower:\t[PHO]AGATCGGAAGAGCGTCGTGTAGGGAAAGAGTGT","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cipj2","text":"Tin_P1_upper:\tCCCTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bn9kc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4d1kc","text":"Inline indexed (barcoded) adapters:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"41l9u","text":"Tin_P1_lower_barcoded:\t[PHO]nnnnnnnnAGATCGGAAGAGCGTCGTGTAGGGAAAGAGTGT","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eqsiv","text":"Tin_P1_upper_barcoded:\tCCCTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCTnnnnnnnn","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6fa4g","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fhmq6","text":"The barcode sequences (nnnnnnnn) can be designed using published scripts (https://bioinf.eva.mpg.de/multiplex/). To prepare 25 μM working solution, mix 50 μl of the upper and lower oligos (100 μM stock) with 40 μl of water and 10 μl of the 10x annealing buffer to obtain 100 μL of working solution. Adapters have to be annealed as follows: heat to 95°C for 1 minute and slowly bring to 20°C with a ramp of 0.1°C/s.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":74,"length":36}],"data":[]},{"key":"6nitf","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4i58n","text":"Oligo used in the second-strand synthesis step:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":47}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9jhto","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e8ph4","text":"Tin_P2-C5:\tGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGCTCTTCCGATCTCCCCC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"537a8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ahajs","text":"Primer ,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b823u","text":"PCR_R_A710:\tCAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATTGGTCACAGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":36,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2inf5","text":"PCR_R_A711:\tCAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATTTGACCCTGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":36,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"do6r0","text":"PCR_R_A712:\tCAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATCCACTCCTGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":36,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9j2o1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6oegk","text":"PCR_R_D701:\tCAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATCGAGTAATGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":36,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ad7n4","text":"PCR_R_D702:\tCAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATTCTCCGGAGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":36,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"23l8i","text":"PCR_R_D703:\tCAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATAATGAGCGGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":36,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1kpnc","text":"PCR_R_D704:\tCAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATGGAATCTCGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":36,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4b1ea","text":"PCR_R_D705:\tCAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATTTCTGAATGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":36,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d3rnf","text":"PCR_R_D706:\tCAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATACGAATTCGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":36,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8d9id","text":"PCR_R_D707:\tCAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATAGCTTCAGGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":36,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"71eek","text":"PCR_R_D708:\tCAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATGCGCATTAGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":36,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"51d5e","text":"PCR_R_D709:\tCAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATCATAGCCGGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":36,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8c1ih","text":"PCR_R_D710:\tCAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATTTCGCGGAGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":36,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dsn2l","text":"PCR_R_D711:\tCAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATGCGCGAGAGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":36,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5oo91","text":"PCR_R_D712:\tCAAGCAGAAGACGGCATACGAGATCTATCGCTGTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGTGC","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":36,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7nbga","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"64n8m","text":"Demultiplexing:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8r4s1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"aopr4","text":"For (i5) for NovaSeq, MiSeq, HiSeq 2000/2500 systems - use the sequence of the one in bold from forward primers.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"91vbe","text":"For index 2 (i5) for iSeq 100, MiniSeq, NextSeq 550, NextSeq 500, HiSeq 4000, and HiSeq 3000 systems - use the reverse complementary sequence in bold from forward primers.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"21299C3B759747F580C4C611254713F3","url":"https://bioinf.eva.mpg.de/multiplex/"}}}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"a9rfk","text":"Primers: prepare 5 μM solutions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"aq2qu","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dtpk0","text":"Oligo used in the second-strand synthesis step (Tin_P2-C5): prepare 15 μM solution","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eb344","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"afe7a","text":"Adapters: prepare 25 μM solutions:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"83utp","text":"mix 50 μl of each pair of barcoded Tin_P1_lower and Tin_P1_upper (100 μM stock), 10 μl of 10x annealing buffer and 40 μl of Tris 10 mM,","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"aa1lv","text":"incubate both tubes in a PCR cycler: 10 s at 95°C, bring down to 12°C 0.1 C per sec; you have the annealed adapters at the concentration of 40 μM,","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3ckvo","text":"adapter is now at 25 μM in 100 μl.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fvhch","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"aa7el","text":"Make sure that you anneal the proper adapter oligos together (from the same pair)! Make sure not to crosscontaminate your barcoded adapters (use filter tips, clean bench with bleach, ideally wotk in a PCR or laminar-flow hood).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare master mix 2 (assemble at room temperature, can precipitate when on ice): undetermined, water 0.7 µL, NEBuffer 4 (10x) undetermined, CoCl2 (2.5 mM) undetermined, GTP (100 mM) undetermined, TdT (20 U/μl)
Prepare master mix 3: undetermined, water undetermined, NEBuffer 4 (10x) undetermined, dNTP mix (25 mM each) undetermined, P2-CCCCC oligo (15 mM) 2 µL, Klenow exo- (5 U/μl)
Prepare master mix 4: undetermined, water undetermined, NEBuffer 4 (10x) undetermined, BSA (10 mg/ml) undetermined, T4 DNA polymerase (3 U/μl)
Prepare barcoded P1 adapters (25 μM concentration). Each sample should be mixed with a different adapter in case the barcoded adapters are used.
Prepare master mix 1: 1.3 µL, NEBuffer 4 (10x) 0.7 µL, water 1 µL, FAST alkaline phosphatase (1 U/μl)
Add 3 μl of master mix 1 to 10 μl of DNA (total volume = 13 μl).
Add 7 μl of the master mix 2 to the denatured DNA (total volume = 20 μl).
Incubate for 30 min at 37°C, heat-kill the enzymes for 10 min at 70°C. Spin down.
Add 10 μl of the master mix 3 to 20 μl of the DNA (total volume = 30 μl).
Incubate at room temperature for 3 hours, heat-kill enzymes for 20 min at 75°C. Spin down.
Add 5 μl of the master mix 4 to 30 μl of the DNA (total volume = 35 μl). Keep both DNA and the mix on the ​ice when assembling the reaction.
Incubate for 15 min at 12°C. Hold at 4°C and proceed directly to the next step.
Perform AMPure cleanup with the beads:sample ratio 2:1 (70 μl of the beads and 35 μl of the reaction) according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Resuspend in 11 μl of 10 mM Tris or water.
Prepare master mix 5: undetermined, water undetermined, PEG-4000 (50%) undetermined, T4 ligase buffer (10x) undetermined, T4 DNA ligase (400 U/μl)
Add 1 μl of the adapter (25 μM working solution) to 10 μl of the DNA. Briefly vortex and spin.
Add 9 μl of the master mix 5 to each sample (total volume = 20 μl).
Incubate at 16°C for 3h. Spin down.
Perform AMPure cleanup with the beads:sample ratio 1:1 (20 μl of the beads and 20 μl of the reaction) according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Resuspend in 11 μl of 10 mM Tris or water.
Transfer 10 μl the purified DNA to the plate/tubes.
Prepare master mix 4: undetermined, water undetermined, Q5 polymerase buffer (5x) undetermined, dNTP mix (25 mM each) undetermined, Q5 hot-start polymerase
Add 35 μl of the master mix 3 to each tube/well. Add 2.5μl of each primer (5 μM working solutions). Add 10 μl of the template.
Run PCR program: 30 s at 98°C 15 cycles of: 10 s at 98°C 20 s at 60°C 25 s at 72°C 5 min at 72°C hold at 4°C Determine experimentally the required number of PCR cycles.
Check reaction on a gel or Tapestation/Fragment Analyzer. Quantify using Qubit fluorimeter.
Incubate for 1 h at 37°C, denature the DNA for 5 min at 95°C, put immediatly on ice. Prepare ice at the and of incubation. Move sample immediatelly form 95°C to the ice.
creator: Tomasz Suchan
